prompt: Trap: stack pressure can narrow options, choose fold.
why_v1: Fold protects chips when stack depth and price do not support continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Fold fits because this trap spot gets dangerous fast when the stack is short.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is stronger here because the trap setup leaves you with shallow-stack pressure and too little room to recover after a weak continue. Preserving chips matters more than forcing action when stack depth and price do not give you enough leverage.
